source_rationale: ADIPOQ (adiponectin) is a canonical marker of mature adipocytes, secreted exclusively by adipose tissue
PLIN1 (perilipin-1) coats lipid droplets in mature adipocytes and is a definitive adipocyte marker
PPARG is the master transcription factor driving adipocyte differentiation and lipid metabolism
Lipoprotein lipase is highly expressed in adipocytes for triglyceride hydrolysis and fatty acid uptake
PNPLA2 (ATGL) is the rate-limiting lipase for triglyceride hydrolysis in adipocytes
GPAM catalyzes the first step of glycerolipid synthesis, highly expressed in adipocytes
AQP7 is an aquaglyceroporin predominantly expressed in adipocytes for glycerol transport
Antisense transcript of hormone-sensitive lipase (LIPE), a key lipolytic enzyme in adipocytes

CXCL14 is a chemokine highly expressed by fibroblasts, particularly in adipose-resident fibroblasts
